Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Further Appearance At Deposition And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-16-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Defendant Luxor Cab Company, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Further Appearance At Deposition is granted. The deposition shall resume at Defense counsel's office. There is no obligation to pay travel expenses. All requests for sanctions are denied. The court advises counsel that re-reading prior testimony is not approved by the court. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
